properties.name: Høgnakken/Novik
properties.rule: NSM sensor/photo-ban zone. Airborne cameras and sensors are prohibited here (including photo/video). Flying a camera/sensor drone needs NSM permission — register with NSM before you fly. The zone is defined by NSM; verify on NSM's map. (FOR-2018-06-22-951 §6)
